---
title: "Standalone Project"
---

# AI Aimbot (Educational Purposes Only)

## *Brief Summary*

#### Currently I am working on a project using image recognition using

#### - OpenCV with CUDA

#### - CVAT

#### - YOLOv8

## *How does it work?*

### In summary:

#### 1. I will be using 200-1000 random in-game screenshots as a dataset.

#### 2. Some of the screenshots will get their data annotation through CVAT to identify character models.

#### 3. Afterwards I will use YOLOv8 to train the data.

#### 4. Using OpenCV for object identification while in-game. Using win32api library to automatically move mouse curser to character models.

## Project Page

::: columns
You can visit my project [here](%22https://github.com/firdauzbk/AI_mbot%22)
:::
